tasks.title: Delete backtest_momentum.py

tasks.description: Superseded by src/research.py + research.py CLI with more rigorous methodology.

tasks.title: Delete run_backtest.py

tasks.title: Remove dead REGIME_MULTIPLIERS config
tasks.description: All values are 1.0 — dead config for single-position strategy. Remove from config.py and compute_regime_multiplier in backtest.py.

tasks.title: Fix misplaced import in reporting.py
tasks.description: Move `from src.config import REGIME_RULES` from line 528 to top of file.

tasks.title: Extract shared load_symbol_data() in db.py
tasks.description: 7 copies of 'load data → filter by cutoff → build dict' pattern. Create load_symbol_data() in db.py, update all callers.

tasks.title: Consolidate regime classification
tasks.description: 3 implementations (daily_scan.py:compute_regime, reporting.py:_classify_regime, backtest.py:compute_regime_multiplier). Consolidate into one using REGIME_RULES.

tasks.title: Derive get_characteristic_names() from function output
tasks.description: Stop hardcoding 29 column names in features.py:81-92. Derive from compute_stock_characteristics() output columns.

tasks.title: Remove Portfolio.get_performance(), use compute_metrics()
tasks.description: get_performance() (src/backtest.py:367-400) duplicates compute_metrics(). Remove get_performance, update tests to use compute_metrics.

tasks.title: Consolidate gate-checking into shared function
tasks.description: Gate logic repeated in backtest.py:575-586, validate_forward.py:606-618. Extract shared gate function.

tasks.title: Reuse TEMPLATE_CSS in validate_forward.py
tasks.description: validate_forward.py:generate_html() has own ~160-line CSS duplicate. Import TEMPLATE_CSS from reporting.py instead.
